name: Noodles Romanof
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles as package directs.
2. Stir together sour cream, half the cheese, chives, salt, pepper and garlic in a bowl.
3. Drain noodles and return to pan. Stir in butter. Fold in sour cream mixture.
4. Place on serving platter and sprinkle with remaining cheese.
